title: Short title
doc_html:
SUBPART C.  LOUISIANA TOURISM PROMOTION DISTRICT ACT

§1281.  Short title

This Subpart shall be known and be cited as the "Louisiana Tourism Promotion District Act".  

Acts 1990, No. 1038, §1, eff. July 26, 1990.
